allow: PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -match "log|trh|191|elitech|RC-" -or $_.Name -match "log|trh|191|elitech" } | Format-List FriendlyName, Class, Status, InstanceId)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "log|trh|cem|datalog|temp" -or $_.MainWindowTitle -match "log|trh" } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize)
